fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.pinyin: yí zhōu bó yān zhǔ
lines.zh: 把船划过去，停靠在雾气笼罩的小洲边。
lines.en: I move my boat to moor by a mist-veiled islet.

lines.pinyin: rì mù kè chóu xīn
lines.zh: 天色将晚，旅人的愁绪又涌上心头。
lines.en: As dusk falls, a traveler's sorrow comes anew.

lines.pinyin: yě kuàng tiān dī shù
lines.zh: 原野空旷辽阔，远处的天空仿佛比树还低。
lines.en: The plain is so vast the sky hangs below the trees.

lines.pinyin: jiāng qīng yuè jìn rén
lines.zh: 江水清澈，水中的月影离人格外亲近。
lines.en: The river is so clear the moon draws near to me.

chars.zh: 住宿、过夜（多音字：xiǔ 量词，如一宿；xiù 星宿）。
停船靠岸（多音字：pō 湖泊）。

background.zh: 孟浩然漫游吴越途中夜泊建德江，借景抒发羁旅孤愁。
background.en: Written while Meng Haoran roamed the south and moored at night on the Jiande River, voicing a traveler's lonely sorrow.

culture.zh: 孟浩然是盛唐山水田园诗派的代表，与王维并称“王孟”。
culture.en: Meng Haoran was a leading High-Tang nature poet, paired with Wang Wei as 'Wang-Meng'.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句叙事点愁，后两句以“天低”“月近”的开阔景象反衬孤独，情景交融。
rhetoric.en: Plain narration sets the sorrow, then the wide low sky and near moon mirror the speaker's loneliness, fusing scene and feeling.

sandhi.zh: "宿"是去声，在去声"建"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sù。
sandhi.en: 宿 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 建; the written pinyin stays sù.

sandhi.zh: "日"是去声，在去声"暮"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：rì。
sandhi.en: 日 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 暮; the written pinyin stays rì.

sandhi.zh: "野"是上声，在非上声"旷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yě。
sandhi.en: 野 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 旷; the written pinyin stays yě.

sandhi.zh: "月"是去声，在去声"近"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yuè。
sandhi.en: 月 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 近; the written pinyin stays yuè.

poems.title: 六月二十七日望湖楼醉书
poems.titlePinyin: liù yuè èr shí qī rì wàng hú lóu zuì shū
poems.titleEn: Written While Drunk at Lake-View Tower on the 27th of the Sixth Month
poems.author: 苏轼

lines.pinyin: hēi yún fān mò wèi zhē shān
lines.zh: 乌黑的云像打翻的墨汁，还没遮住山头。
lines.en: Black clouds spill like upset ink, not yet hiding the hills.

lines.pinyin: bái yǔ tiào zhū luàn rù chuán
lines.zh: 白亮的雨点像跳动的珍珠，纷乱地溅进船里。
lines.en: Bright rain leaps like pearls, scattering into the boat.

lines.pinyin: juǎn dì fēng lái hū chuī sàn
lines.zh: 席卷大地的狂风忽然吹来，把乌云骤雨一下吹散。
lines.en: A wind sweeps the ground and suddenly blows it all away.

lines.pinyin: wàng hú lóu xià shuǐ rú tiān
lines.zh: 望湖楼下的湖水，澄澈得如同蓝天一般。
lines.en: Below Lake-View Tower the water is clear as sky.

chars.zh: 眺望，这里是楼名“望湖楼”。
卷起、席卷（多音字：juàn 书卷）。
吹散、消散（多音字：sǎn 松散）。

background.zh: 苏轼任杭州通判时，在西湖望湖楼上趁醉写下骤雨忽来忽去的奇景。
background.en: Su Shi, serving in Hangzhou, wrote this drunk at West Lake's Lake-View Tower, capturing a sudden summer storm.

culture.zh: 苏轼是北宋文坛巨擘，诗、词、文、书、画皆精，为“唐宋八大家”之一。
culture.en: Su Shi was a towering Northern Song master of poetry, prose, calligraphy and painting, one of the Eight Masters of Tang-Song prose.

rhetoric.zh: “翻墨”“跳珠”运用比喻，四句写出云、雨、风、晴的迅速变化，动感强烈。
rhetoric.en: Vivid metaphors ('spilt ink', 'leaping pearls') and four swift scenes—cloud, rain, wind, calm—give the storm great momentum.

sandhi.zh: "六"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：liù。
sandhi.en: 六 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays liù.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"跳"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 跳; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "乱"是去声，在去声"入"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：luàn。
sandhi.en: 乱 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 入; the written pinyin stays luàn.

sandhi.zh: "卷"是上声，在非上声"地"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：juǎn。
sandhi.en: 卷 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 地; the written pinyin stays juǎn.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"如"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 如; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

poems.title: 西江月·夜行黄沙道中
poems.titlePinyin: xī jiāng yuè · yè xíng huáng shā dào zhōng
poems.titleEn: Moon over the West River: Walking the Huangsha Road at Night
poems.author: 辛弃疾

lines.pinyin: míng yuè bié zhī jīng què
lines.zh: 明亮的月光惊动了栖息在斜枝上的喜鹊。
lines.en: Bright moonlight startles magpies from a slanting branch.

lines.pinyin: qīng fēng bàn yè míng chán
lines.zh: 半夜里清凉的风中传来蝉的鸣叫。
lines.en: In the cool midnight breeze cicadas are crying.

lines.pinyin: dào huā xiāng lǐ shuō fēng nián
lines.zh: 稻花的香气里，人们谈论着丰收的年景。
lines.en: Amid the fragrance of rice flowers they speak of a good harvest.

lines.pinyin: tīng qǔ wā shēng yī piàn
lines.zh: 听到一片此起彼伏的蛙鸣声。
lines.en: Listen—a chorus of frogs rises all around.

lines.pinyin: qī bā gè xīng tiān wài
lines.zh: 天边稀疏地挂着七八颗星星。
lines.en: Seven or eight stars hang at the edge of the sky.

lines.pinyin: liǎng sān diǎn yǔ shān qián
lines.zh: 山前飘落两三点雨。
lines.en: Two or three raindrops fall before the hills.

lines.pinyin: jiù shí máo diàn shè lín biān
lines.zh: 从前那座茅草店就在土地庙树林的旁边。
lines.en: The old thatched inn stood by the woods near the village shrine.

lines.pinyin: lù zhuǎn xī qiáo hū xiàn
lines.zh: 山路一转，过了溪上的小桥，茅店忽然出现在眼前。
lines.en: The path turns past the brook's bridge—suddenly there it appears.

chars.zh: 斜出的，“别枝”指横斜的枝条（多音字：biè 别扭）。
一片，形容声音连成一片。
店铺，这里指茅草小客店。
土地庙，“社林”指土地庙旁的树林。
chars.en: village shrine of the earth god

chars.zh: 同“现”，显现、出现（多音字：jiàn 看见）。

background.zh: 辛弃疾闲居江西上饶时，夜行黄沙岭，写下这首描绘农村夏夜的词。
background.en: Written when Xin Qiji lived in retirement in Jiangxi, walking the Huangsha ridge at night to depict a summer countryside evening.

culture.zh: “西江月”是词牌名，“夜行黄沙道中”是题目；社林指祭土地神的庙旁树林。
culture.en: 'Xijiangyue' is the tune pattern and the rest is the title; 'shelin' refers to woods by the earth-god shrine.

rhetoric.zh: 上片以明月、蝉鸣、稻香、蛙声写丰年喜悦，下片以“忽见”写转弯遇店的惊喜，动静结合、对仗工整。
rhetoric.en: The first stanza paints harvest joy through moon, cicadas, rice scent and frogs; the second's 'suddenly appears' captures delight at the inn, with neat parallelism and balanced motion and stillness.

sandhi.zh: "月"是去声，在去声"夜"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yuè。
sandhi.en: 月 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays yuè.

sandhi.zh: "半"是去声，在去声"夜"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：bàn。
sandhi.en: 半 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays bàn.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"说"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 说; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "取"是上声，在非上声"蛙"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：qǔ。
sandhi.en: 取 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 蛙; the written pinyin stays qǔ.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"片"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 片 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "两"是上声，在非上声"三"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǎng。
sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 三; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

sandhi.zh: "点"在上声"雨"前变读阳平（第二声）：diǎn→dián。
sandhi.en: 点 comes before the third-tone 雨, so it is read in second tone: diǎn → dián.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"山"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "转"是上声，在非上声"溪"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhuǎn。
sandhi.en: 转 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 溪; the written pinyin stays zhuǎn.

lines.pinyin: hóng jūn bù pà yuǎn zhēng nán
lines.zh: 红军不怕万里长征路上的种种艰难。
lines.en: The Red Army fears not the trials of the long march.

lines.pinyin: wàn shuǐ qiān shān zhǐ děng xián
lines.zh: 千山万水在他们眼里不过是平平常常的事。
lines.en: Countless rivers and peaks are nothing to them.

lines.pinyin: wǔ lǐng wēi yí téng xì làng
lines.zh: 绵延起伏的五岭，在红军看来只像翻腾的细小波浪。
lines.en: The rolling Five Ridges seem mere ripples.

lines.pinyin: wū méng páng bó zǒu ní wán
lines.zh: 气势磅礴的乌蒙山，也不过像脚下滚动的泥丸。
lines.en: The mighty Wumeng Mountains roll past like clay balls.

lines.pinyin: jīn shā shuǐ pāi yún yá nuǎn
lines.zh: 金沙江的水拍打着高耸入云的山崖，使人感到温暖。
lines.en: Waters of the Jinsha lap warm against cloud-high cliffs.

lines.pinyin: dà dù qiáo héng tiě suǒ hán
lines.zh: 大渡河上横跨的泸定桥，铁索高悬，令人胆寒。
lines.en: Over the Dadu the bridge's iron chains hang cold.

lines.pinyin: gèng xǐ mín shān qiān lǐ xuě
lines.zh: 更让人欢喜的是翻过了千里皑皑白雪的岷山。
lines.en: More gladdening still: the thousand-li snows of Min Mountain.

lines.pinyin: sān jūn guò hòu jìn kāi yán
lines.zh: 红军将士翻越过去之后，个个喜笑颜开。
lines.en: Once the whole army crossed, every face broke into a smile.

chars.zh: 长征，长途行军（多音字：zhǎng 生长）。
只、仅仅（多音字：zhī 一只）。
乌蒙山，山名（多音字：mēng 蒙骗；měng 蒙古）。
磅礴，气势宏大（多音字：bàng 磅秤）。
云，“云崖”指高耸入云的山崖。
温暖，写渡江胜利的喜悦。
里，长度单位，“千里”极言其广。

background.zh: 1935年红军长征即将胜利之际，毛泽东写下此诗，回顾二万五千里征途的艰险与豪情。
background.en: Mao Zedong wrote this in 1935 as the Long March neared victory, recalling the perils and heroism of the 25,000-li trek.

culture.zh: 全诗概括了越五岭、渡金沙江、夺泸定桥、翻岷山等长征中的重大历程。
culture.en: The poem condenses key episodes of the March: crossing the Five Ridges, the Jinsha, Luding Bridge, and the Min snows.

rhetoric.zh: 运用夸张与对比，把崇山大河化为“细浪”“泥丸”，以小衬大，气势雄浑，对仗工整。
rhetoric.en: Hyperbole and contrast shrink great mountains and rivers to 'ripples' and 'clay balls', creating heroic grandeur in tight parallel couplets.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"怕"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 怕 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "远"是上声，在非上声"征"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yuǎn。
sandhi.en: 远 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 征; the written pinyin stays yuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"千"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 千; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "只"在上声"等"前变读阳平（第二声）：zhǐ→zhí。
sandhi.en: 只 comes before the third-tone 等, so it is read in second tone: zhǐ → zhí.

sandhi.zh: "等"是上声，在非上声"闲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：děng。
sandhi.en: 等 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 闲; the written pinyin stays děng.

sandhi.zh: "五"在上声"岭"前变读阳平（第二声）：wǔ→wú。
sandhi.en: 五 comes before the third-tone 岭, so it is read in second tone: wǔ → wú.

sandhi.zh: "岭"是上声，在非上声"逶"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐng。
sandhi.en: 岭 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 逶; the written pinyin stays lǐng.

sandhi.zh: "走"是上声，在非上声"泥"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒu。
sandhi.en: 走 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 泥; the written pinyin stays zǒu.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"拍"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 拍; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "大"是去声，在去声"渡"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dà。
sandhi.en: 大 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 渡; the written pinyin stays dà.

sandhi.zh: "铁"在上声"索"前变读阳平（第二声）：tiě→tié。
sandhi.en: 铁 comes before the third-tone 索, so it is read in second tone: tiě → tié.

sandhi.zh: "索"是上声，在非上声"寒"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：suǒ。
sandhi.en: 索 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 寒; the written pinyin stays suǒ.

sandhi.zh: "喜"是上声，在非上声"岷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xǐ。
sandhi.en: 喜 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 岷; the written pinyin stays xǐ.

sandhi.zh: "里"在上声"雪"前变读阳平（第二声）：lǐ→lí。
sandhi.en: 里 comes before the third-tone 雪, so it is read in second tone: lǐ → lí.

sandhi.zh: "过"是去声，在去声"后"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：guò。
sandhi.en: 过 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 后; the written pinyin stays guò.

lines.pinyin: jiǔ qū huáng hé wàn lǐ shā
lines.zh: 黄河弯弯曲曲，挟带着万里黄沙奔流。
lines.en: The winding Yellow River carries sand for ten thousand li.

lines.pinyin: làng táo fēng bǒ zì tiān yá
lines.zh: 波浪冲刷、狂风颠簸，仿佛是从天边奔涌而来。
lines.en: Waves scour and winds toss it, as if from the world's far edge.

lines.pinyin: rú jīn zhí shàng yín hé qù
lines.zh: 如今我要沿着黄河一直上到天上的银河去，
lines.en: Now let me ride straight up to the Silver River in the sky,

lines.pinyin: tóng dào qiān niú zhī nǚ jiā
lines.zh: 一同到牛郎织女居住的人家做客。
lines.en: and visit together the homes of the Cowherd and Weaver Maid.

chars.zh: 波浪；又为词牌“浪淘沙”用字。
颠簸、扬动（多音字：bò 簸箕）。

background.zh: 刘禹锡《浪淘沙》组诗共九首，此为第一首，咏黄河气势并寄托豪迈奇想。
background.en: This is the first of Liu Yuxi's nine 'Langtaosha' poems, praising the Yellow River's force and voicing bold fancy.

culture.zh: 末句借牛郎织女的神话传说，化用《博物志》乘槎上天河的典故。
culture.en: The ending draws on the Cowherd-Weaver myth and the legend of riding a raft up to the heavenly river.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写实，气势磅礴；后两句驰骋想象，由黄河直上银河，并用典牵牛织女的传说，浪漫豪迈。
rhetoric.en: The first couplet is grandly realistic; the second leaps to imagination, soaring from the river to the Milky Way and alluding to the legend of the Cowherd and Weaver Maid, romantic and bold.

sandhi.zh: "九"是上声，在非上声"曲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǔ。
sandhi.en: 九 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 曲; the written pinyin stays jiǔ.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"沙"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 沙; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

poems.title: 江南春
poems.titleEn: Spring in the South of the Yangtze
poems.author: 杜牧

lines.pinyin: qiān lǐ yīng tí lǜ yìng hóng
lines.zh: 辽阔的江南到处黄莺啼鸣，绿叶映衬着红花。
lines.en: For a thousand li orioles sing, green sets off red.

lines.pinyin: shuǐ cūn shān guō jiǔ qí fēng
lines.zh: 依水的村庄、靠山的城郭，酒店的旗子在风中飘扬。
lines.en: By riverside hamlets and hill-girt towns, tavern flags flutter in the breeze.

lines.pinyin: nán cháo sì bǎi bā shí sì
lines.zh: 南朝时修建的众多佛寺，
lines.en: The four hundred eighty temples of the Southern Dynasties—

lines.pinyin: duō shǎo lóu tái yān yǔ zhōng
lines.zh: 如今有多少楼台亭阁笼罩在迷蒙的烟雨之中。
lines.en: how many towers now stand veiled in misty rain.

chars.zh: 绿色，指绿叶（多音字：lù 绿林）。
朝代，“南朝”（多音字：zhāo 朝阳）。
数字十，“四百八十”极言寺庙之多。
亭台，“楼台”泛指楼阁建筑。

background.zh: 杜牧描绘江南春日的明丽风光，并由南朝众多寺庙引发对历史兴亡的感慨。
background.en: Du Mu paints the bright spring scenery of the Jiangnan region while musing on history through the Southern Dynasties' temples.

culture.zh: “南朝四百八十寺”反映南朝崇佛、广建佛寺的史实，今多隐于烟雨。
culture.en: The line reflects the Southern Dynasties' Buddhist fervor and their many temples, now half-lost in mist.

rhetoric.zh: 以“千里”总写，色彩对比鲜明，结尾以“烟雨”朦胧之景寄寓怀古之思，景中含情。
rhetoric.en: A sweeping 'thousand li' opening, vivid color contrast, and a misty close that carries reflection on the past.

sandhi.zh: "里"是上声，在非上声"莺"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 里 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 莺; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 中; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

poems.title: 书湖阴先生壁
poems.titlePinyin: shū hú yīn xiān shēng bì
poems.author: 王安石

lines.pinyin: máo yán cháng sǎo jìng wú tái
lines.zh: 茅草屋檐下经常打扫，洁净得没有一点青苔。
lines.en: The thatched eaves, often swept, are clean and free of moss.

lines.pinyin: huā mù chéng qí shǒu zì zāi
lines.zh: 花草树木一畦一畦，都是主人亲手栽种的。
lines.en: Flowers and trees in neat beds, all planted by his own hand.

lines.pinyin: yī shuǐ hù tián jiāng lǜ rào
lines.zh: 一道溪水护卫着农田，把绿色的田地环绕起来。
lines.en: A stream guards the fields, encircling the green all around.

lines.pinyin: liǎng shān pái tà sòng qīng lái
lines.zh: 两座青山推门而入，把青翠的颜色送到眼前。
lines.en: Two hills, flinging the door wide, deliver their blue-green in.

chars.zh: 经常、长久（多音字：zhǎng 生长）。
成、构成，“成畦”指排成一畦畦。
田园中分块的小区，菜畦。
绿色的田野（多音字：lù 绿林）。

background.zh: 王安石晚年退居江宁，题写在友人湖阴先生（杨德逢）家的墙壁上，赞其庭院清雅。
background.en: Written in Wang Anshi's later years in Jiangning, inscribed on the wall of his friend Mr. Huyin, praising his tidy, elegant home.

culture.zh: “书……壁”是古代题壁诗的常见形式，借主人居处之洁雅见其品格高洁。
culture.en: Inscribing poems on walls was a common Tang-Song practice; the tidy home reflects the host's noble character.

rhetoric.zh: 后两句用拟人和对仗，“护”“将”“排”“送”赋予山水以情意，化静为动，生动传神。
rhetoric.en: The last couplet personifies water and hills—'guard', 'encircle', 'fling open', 'deliver'—turning still scenery lively, in tight parallelism.

sandhi.zh: "扫"是上声，在非上声"净"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：sǎo。
sandhi.en: 扫 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 净; the written pinyin stays sǎo.

sandhi.zh: "手"是上声，在非上声"自"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǒu。
sandhi.en: 手 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 自; the written pinyin stays shǒu.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"水"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 水 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"护"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 护; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.en: 两 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays liǎng.

lines.pinyin: shào xiǎo lí jiā lǎo dà huí
lines.zh: 年少时离开家乡，年老了才回来。
lines.en: Young I left home, old I now return.

lines.pinyin: xiāng yīn wú gǎi bìn máo cuī
lines.zh: 家乡的口音没有改变，鬓边的头发却已稀疏花白。
lines.en: My hometown accent unchanged, but the hair at my temples has thinned.

lines.pinyin: ér tóng xiāng jiàn bù xiāng shí
lines.zh: 村里的孩子见了我却都不认识，
lines.en: The children meet me but do not know me,

lines.pinyin: xiào wèn kè cóng hé chù lái
lines.zh: 笑着问我这位客人是从哪里来的。
lines.en: and ask with a smile: 'Where, sir, do you come from?'

chars.zh: （鬓发）疏落花白，此处旧读 cuī 以协韵（今读 shuāi）。
相见、相识，表互相或动作偏指（多音字：xiàng 相貌）。
客人，孩子把诗人当作外来客。

background.zh: 贺知章年逾八十辞官还乡，写下久客返乡、物是人非的感慨。
background.en: Written when He Zhizhang, over eighty, resigned and returned home after decades away, voicing the ache of long absence.

culture.zh: “衰”字旧读 cuī，与“回”“来”押韵；体现古诗音韵之美。
culture.en: The character 衰 takes its old reading 'cuī' to rhyme with 回 and 来, showing classical rhyme practice.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句对比“少小”与“老大”、“乡音”与“鬓衰”，后两句以儿童发问的细节含蓄抒发悲凉。
rhetoric.en: The first couplet contrasts youth and age, unchanged accent and graying hair; the children's question quietly conveys bittersweet feeling.

sandhi.zh: "偶"是上声，在非上声"书"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：ǒu。
sandhi.en: 偶 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 书; the written pinyin stays ǒu.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"离"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 离; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "老"是上声，在非上声"大"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǎo。
sandhi.en: 老 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 大; the written pinyin stays lǎo.

sandhi.zh: "改"是上声，在非上声"鬓"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǎi。
sandhi.en: 改 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鬓; the written pinyin stays gǎi.

sandhi.zh: "笑"是去声，在去声"问"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：xiào。
sandhi.en: 笑 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 问; the written pinyin stays xiào.

lines.pinyin: shèng rì xún fāng sì shuǐ bīn
lines.zh: 在风和日丽的日子里，到泗水之滨去观赏春花。
lines.en: On a fine day I seek spring's blooms by the Si River's shore.

lines.pinyin: wú biān guāng jǐng yī shí xīn
lines.zh: 无边无际的风光景物，一时间都焕然一新。
lines.en: Boundless scenery all at once is fresh and new.

lines.pinyin: děng xián shí dé dōng fēng miàn
lines.zh: 轻易就能认出春风的面貌，
lines.en: With ease one knows the face of the east wind;

lines.pinyin: wàn zǐ qiān hóng zǒng shì chūn
lines.zh: 那万紫千红的景象，全都是春天带来的。
lines.en: Ten thousand purples and a thousand reds—all of it is spring.

chars.zh: 胜日，天气晴好的美好日子。

chars.en: one (in 一时: all at once)

chars.zh: 认识、辨识（多音字：zhì 标识）。
助词，表示能够（多音字：de 跑得快；děi 必须）。

background.zh: 朱熹借春日游赏泗水之景，实为以孔门求学之地寓意求圣人之道、探求真理。
background.en: Ostensibly a spring outing by the Si River, the poem allegorizes Zhu Xi's pursuit of the sages' Way and truth.

culture.zh: 泗水流经孔子故乡曲阜，是儒家圣地；“寻芳”暗喻寻求圣人之道。
culture.en: The Si River runs through Confucius's home of Qufu, a Confucian holy site; 'seeking blooms' allegorizes seeking the sages' teaching.

rhetoric.zh: 以“万紫千红”形象写春，末句寓理于景，是富有哲理的写景名句。
rhetoric.en: Vivid color imagery 'ten thousand purples and a thousand reds' embeds philosophy in scenery, a famous scene-with-meaning line.

sandhi.zh: "胜"是去声，在去声"日"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：shèng。
sandhi.en: 胜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 日; the written pinyin stays shèng.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"滨"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 滨; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "景"是上声，在非上声"一"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǐng。
sandhi.en: 景 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 一; the written pinyin stays jǐng.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"时"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 时 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "等"是上声，在非上声"闲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：děng。
sandhi.en: 等 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 闲; the written pinyin stays děng.

sandhi.zh: "紫"是上声，在非上声"千"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǐ。
sandhi.en: 紫 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 千; the written pinyin stays zǐ.

sandhi.zh: "总"是上声，在非上声"是"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒng。
sandhi.en: 总 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 是; the written pinyin stays zǒng.

lines.pinyin: chūn chéng wú chù bù fēi huā
lines.zh: 暮春时节，长安城中处处柳絮飞舞、落红无数。
lines.en: In the spring city there is nowhere the blossoms do not fly.

lines.pinyin: hán shí dōng fēng yù liǔ xié
lines.zh: 寒食节里东风吹拂，皇宫御苑中的柳枝随风斜垂。
lines.en: At Cold Food, the east wind bends the palace willows aslant.

lines.pinyin: rì mù hàn gōng chuán là zhú
lines.zh: 黄昏时分，皇宫里传送着赏赐的蜡烛。
lines.en: At dusk the Han palace passes out candles,

lines.pinyin: qīng yān sàn rù wǔ hóu jiā
lines.zh: 袅袅轻烟飘散，进入权贵宠臣的家中。
lines.en: and light smoke drifts into the homes of the five marquises.

chars.zh: 地方（多音字：chǔ 指处理、相处）。
食，寒食节（这天禁火吃冷食）。
帝王所用的，御柳即皇宫的柳。
传送、传递（多音字：zhuàn 指传记）。
飘散、散开（多音字：sǎn 指零散）。

background.zh: 寒食节在清明前一两天，旧俗禁火冷食；唐代皇帝在这天用榆柳之火赐给近臣。
background.en: The Cold Food Festival falls just before Qingming, when fires were banned; the Tang emperor gave new fire to favoured officials.

culture.zh: “五侯”原指汉代受封的外戚宠臣，诗中借指唐代受宠的权贵。
culture.en: The 'five marquises' originally meant Han imperial in-laws, here standing for the favoured nobility of Tang.

rhetoric.zh: 首句“无处不飞花”以双重否定夸张满城飞花之盛；后两句以“传蜡烛”“入五侯家”含蓄讽刺特权，借古讽今。
rhetoric.en: The opening's double negative—nowhere are there not flying blossoms—exaggerates a city entirely filled with drifting petals; the closing lines then gently satirize privilege through the imperial candles reaching only the powerful.

sandhi.zh: "柳"是上声，在非上声"斜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：liǔ。
sandhi.en: 柳 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 斜; the written pinyin stays liǔ.

sandhi.zh: "日"是去声，在去声"暮"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：rì。
sandhi.en: 日 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 暮; the written pinyin stays rì.

sandhi.zh: "散"是去声，在去声"入"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：sàn。
sandhi.en: 散 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 入; the written pinyin stays sàn.

sandhi.zh: "五"是上声，在非上声"侯"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǔ。
sandhi.en: 五 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 侯; the written pinyin stays wǔ.

lines.pinyin: tiáo tiáo qiān niú xīng
lines.zh: 遥远的牵牛星啊，
lines.en: Far, far away shines the Cowherd star,

lines.pinyin: jiǎo jiǎo hé hàn nǚ
lines.zh: 明亮的银河边的织女星。
lines.en: bright, bright the Weaving Maid by the River of Heaven.

lines.pinyin: xiān xiān zhuó sù shǒu
lines.zh: 她伸出柔美洁白的双手，
lines.en: Slender, she lifts her pale white hands,

lines.pinyin: zhá zhá nòng jī zhù
lines.zh: 札札地摆弄着织布机的梭子。
lines.en: clack-clack she works the loom and shuttle.

lines.pinyin: zhōng rì bù chéng zhāng
lines.zh: 织了一整天也织不成一段布纹，
lines.en: All day she weaves but finishes no pattern,

lines.pinyin: qì tì líng rú yǔ
lines.zh: 眼泪零落，像雨一样落下。
lines.en: her tears fall scattered like the rain.

lines.pinyin: hé hàn qīng qiě qiǎn
lines.zh: 那银河既清澈又浅显，
lines.en: The River of Heaven is clear and shallow,

lines.pinyin: xiāng qù fù jǐ xǔ
lines.zh: 两人相隔又能有多远呢？
lines.en: and how far apart, after all, are they?

lines.pinyin: yíng yíng yī shuǐ jiān
lines.zh: 只隔着一道清浅的河水，
lines.en: Just one stretch of brimming water lies between,

lines.pinyin: mò mò bù dé yǔ
lines.zh: 却只能含情相望，不能互诉衷肠。
lines.en: yet, gazing in silence, they cannot speak.

chars.zh: 纤纤，细长柔美（多音字：qiàn 指纤夫）。
互相，相去即相距（多音字：xiàng 指相貌）。
多少（多音字：jī 指几乎、茶几）。
盈盈，水清浅充盈的样子。
中间、之间（多音字：jiàn 指间隔、缝隙）。
脉脉，含情相视的样子（多音字：mài 指脉搏）。
能、得以（多音字：de 助词；děi 须要）。

background.zh: 选自《古诗十九首》，是东汉末年文人创作的五言诗，借牛郎织女的传说抒写离别相思。
background.en: From the 'Nineteen Old Poems' of the late Eastern Han, it uses the Cowherd-and-Weaving-Maid legend to voice the sorrow of parting.

culture.zh: 牵牛星与织女星隔银河相望，是中国七夕传说的源头。
culture.en: The Cowherd and Weaving Maid stars, separated by the Milky Way, are the root of the Qixi (Double Seventh) legend.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗六组叠词（迢迢、皎皎等）回环往复，借物拟人；“相去复几许”以反问轻叹咫尺天涯，情景交融，含蓄动人。
rhetoric.en: Six pairs of reduplicated words give it a musical rhythm, blending scene and feeling through personification; how far apart, after all, are they? sighs a rhetorical question at a gap both tiny and unbridgeable.

sandhi.zh: "皎"在上声"皎"前变读阳平（第二声）：jiǎo→jiáo。
sandhi.en: 皎 comes before the third-tone 皎, so it is read in second tone: jiǎo → jiáo.

sandhi.zh: "皎"是上声，在非上声"河"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiǎo。
sandhi.en: 皎 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 河; the written pinyin stays jiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "泣"是去声，在去声"涕"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：qì。
sandhi.en: 泣 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 涕; the written pinyin stays qì.

sandhi.zh: "且"在上声"浅"前变读阳平（第二声）：qiě→qié。
sandhi.en: 且 comes before the third-tone 浅, so it is read in second tone: qiě → qié.

sandhi.zh: "几"在上声"许"前变读阳平（第二声）：jǐ→jí。
sandhi.en: 几 comes before the third-tone 许, so it is read in second tone: jǐ → jí.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"水"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 水 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"间"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 间; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

poems.title: 十五夜望月
poems.titleEn: Gazing at the Moon on the Fifteenth Night
poems.author: 王建

lines.pinyin: zhōng tíng dì bái shù qī yā
lines.zh: 庭院中地面洒满月光一片银白，树上栖息着乌鸦。
lines.en: In the courtyard the ground is white, crows roost in the trees,

lines.pinyin: lěng lù wú shēng shī guì huā
lines.zh: 清冷的露水悄无声息地打湿了桂花。
lines.en: and cold dew silently dampens the osmanthus blossoms.

lines.pinyin: jīn yè yuè míng rén jìn wàng
lines.zh: 今夜明月当空，人们都在抬头望月，
lines.en: Tonight the moon is bright and all gaze up at it,

lines.pinyin: bù zhī qiū sī luò shuí jiā
lines.zh: 不知这秋天的思念会落到谁家呢？
lines.en: but who knows whose home this autumn longing falls upon?

chars.zh: 中间，中庭即庭院之中（多音字：zhòng 指击中）。
白色，指月光照得地面发白。
露水（多音字：lòu 指露脸、露馅）。
全、都（多音字：jǐn 指尽管、尽量）。
思念，秋思即秋天的情思。
落、降临（多音字：là 指落下东西；lào 指落枕）。

background.zh: 这是一首中秋望月怀人的诗，原题下有“时会琴客”一句，写于中秋之夜。
background.en: Written on the Mid-Autumn night, this poem gazes at the full moon while longing for distant loved ones.

culture.zh: 中秋赏月、思乡怀人是中国传统节俗；桂花与月亮常一起出现（传说月中有桂树）。
culture.en: Moon-viewing and homesickness mark the Mid-Autumn Festival; osmanthus and the moon pair in legend, which places a cassia tree on the moon.

rhetoric.zh: 末句不直说自己思乡，而问“秋思落谁家”，以委婉含蓄之笔将个人之情推及天下人。
rhetoric.en: Instead of stating his own longing, the poet asks whose home the autumn sorrow falls upon, broadening private feeling to all.

sandhi.zh: "五"是上声，在非上声"夜"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǔ。
sandhi.en: 五 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays wǔ.

sandhi.zh: "夜"是去声，在去声"望"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yè。
sandhi.en: 夜 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 望; the written pinyin stays yè.

sandhi.zh: "冷"是上声，在非上声"露"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lěng。
sandhi.en: 冷 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 露; the written pinyin stays lěng.

lines.pinyin: dà mò shā rú xuě
lines.zh: 茫茫大沙漠中，沙子洁白得像雪一样。
lines.en: On the great desert the sand is white as snow,

lines.pinyin: yān shān yuè sì gōu
lines.zh: 燕山上一弯新月像弯钩一样高挂。
lines.en: over the Yan Mountains the moon hangs like a hook.

lines.pinyin: hé dāng jīn luò nǎo
lines.zh: 什么时候才能戴上黄金打造的笼头，
lines.en: When will it wear a golden bridle on its head,

lines.pinyin: kuài zǒu tà qīng qiū
lines.zh: 在清爽的秋天里纵情奔驰、施展才能呢？
lines.en: and gallop swiftly through the clear autumn air?

chars.zh: 广大，大漠即大沙漠（多音字：dài 指大夫）。
燕山，地名（多音字：yàn 指燕子）。
像、好似（多音字：shì 指似的）。
弯钩，比喻新月，也指兵器。
何当即“何时能够”（多音字：dàng 指当作、恰当）。
笼罩、套住，金络脑指金饰的马笼头（多音字：lào 指络子）。
头部，络脑即套在马头上的笼头。
清爽，清秋即清爽的秋天。

background.zh: 李贺《马诗》共二十三首，这是第五首，借咏马抒发渴望建功立业、却怀才不遇的感慨。
background.en: The fifth of Li He's twenty-three 'Horse Poems', it uses the horse to voice his yearning to serve and his frustrated talent.

culture.zh: 古人常以骏马比喻人才，以“伯乐相马”寄托对赏识者的期盼。
culture.en: Fine horses traditionally symbolize talented people, and the wish for a 'Bole' to recognize them.

rhetoric.zh: 首联“沙如雪”“月似钩”比喻工整对仗，写边塞景象起兴；后两句用反问托物言志，借马自喻。
rhetoric.en: The opening couplet's matched similes—sand like snow, moon like a hook—set the frontier scene in parallel form; the closing lines then use a rhetorical question to make the horse a vehicle for the poet's own ambition.

sandhi.zh: "马"是上声，在非上声"诗"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎ。
sandhi.en: 马 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 诗; the written pinyin stays mǎ.

sandhi.zh: "大"是去声，在去声"漠"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dà。
sandhi.en: 大 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 漠; the written pinyin stays dà.

sandhi.zh: "月"是去声，在去声"似"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：yuè。
sandhi.en: 月 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 似; the written pinyin stays yuè.

sandhi.zh: "走"是上声，在非上声"踏"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒu。
sandhi.en: 走 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 踏; the written pinyin stays zǒu.

lines.pinyin: qiān chuí wàn záo chū shēn shān
lines.zh: 石灰石经过千万次的锤打和开凿，才从深山中开采出来。
lines.en: Through a thousand hammer-blows and ten thousand chisels it comes out of the deep mountains,

lines.pinyin: liè huǒ fén shāo ruò děng xián
lines.zh: 面对熊熊烈火的焚烧，它却看得平平常常、毫不在意。
lines.en: and it treats the raging fire that burns it as an everyday thing.

lines.pinyin: fěn gǔ suì shēn hún bù pà
lines.zh: 即使被烧得粉身碎骨，也全然不怕，
lines.en: Though ground to powder and shattered to bits, it is not afraid at all,

lines.pinyin: yào liú qīng bái zài rén jiān
lines.zh: 只为把清白纯洁留存在人世间。
lines.en: for it wishes only to leave its purity behind in the world of men.

chars.zh: 粉碎，粉骨即骨头被磨成粉。
骨头（多音字：gū 指骨碌、花骨朵）。
要、想要（多音字：yāo 指要求、要挟）。
清白，洁白纯净，喻高尚操守。
人间即人世（多音字：jiàn 指间隔）。

background.zh: 相传于谦十二岁时写下此诗，借石灰自喻；他后来成为明代名臣，忠贞清廉。
background.en: Said to be written when Yu Qian was twelve, the poem uses lime as a self-portrait; he later became a loyal, upright Ming official.

culture.zh: 这是一首托物言志的咏物诗，以石灰象征坚贞高洁、不怕牺牲的人格。
culture.en: An object-as-emblem poem, it makes lime a symbol of steadfast purity and willing sacrifice.

rhetoric.zh: 首句“千锤万凿”夸张历炼之多，两联对偶工整；全诗用拟人和双关，“清白”既指石灰之色，又指人的高洁品格，层层递进。
rhetoric.en: The opening a thousand hammer-blows, ten thousand chisels exaggerates the ordeal, in couplets of neat parallelism; throughout, personification and a pun make 'pure white' mean both the colour of lime and the poet's moral integrity.

sandhi.zh: "火"是上声，在非上声"焚"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：huǒ。
sandhi.en: 火 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 焚; the written pinyin stays huǒ.

sandhi.zh: "等"是上声，在非上声"闲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：děng。
sandhi.en: 等 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 闲; the written pinyin stays děng.

sandhi.zh: "粉"在上声"骨"前变读阳平（第二声）：fěn→fén。
sandhi.en: 粉 comes before the third-tone 骨, so it is read in second tone: fěn → fén.

sandhi.zh: "骨"是上声，在非上声"碎"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǔ。
sandhi.en: 骨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 碎; the written pinyin stays gǔ.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"怕"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 怕 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

lines.pinyin: yǎo dìng qīng shān bù fàng sōng
lines.zh: 竹子牢牢地咬定青山，绝不放松。
lines.en: Biting fast into the green mountain it will not let go,

lines.pinyin: lì gēn yuán zài pò yán zhōng
lines.zh: 它把根深深扎在破裂的岩石缝隙之中。
lines.en: its roots set firmly in the cracks of broken rock.

lines.pinyin: qiān mó wàn jī hái jiān jìng
lines.zh: 历经千万次的磨难和打击，依然坚定强劲，
lines.en: Through a thousand grindings and ten thousand blows it stays strong,

lines.pinyin: rèn ěr dōng xī nán běi fēng
lines.zh: 任凭你东西南北各个方向的狂风吹打。
lines.en: let the winds blow from east, west, south, or north as they will.

chars.zh: 咬住，比喻竹根紧紧抓住。
咬定，牢牢咬住、坚定不移。
破裂的，破岩即裂开的岩石。
中间、之中（多音字：zhòng 指击中）。
磨难、磨炼（多音字：mò 指磨面、石磨）。
仍然、依然（多音字：huán 指归还）。
坚劲，强劲有力（多音字：jìn 指力气、干劲）。
任凭、无论（多音字：rén 指姓氏、地名）。

background.zh: 郑燮（郑板桥）是清代书画家，“扬州八怪”之一，这是他为自己的画《竹石图》所题的诗。
background.en: Zheng Xie (Zheng Banqiao), a Qing painter and one of the 'Eight Eccentrics of Yangzhou', inscribed this poem on his own painting of bamboo and rock.

culture.zh: 竹在中国文化中象征坚贞、虚心和气节，与梅、兰、菊并称“四君子”。
culture.en: Bamboo symbolizes integrity and humility, and with plum, orchid, and chrysanthemum forms the 'Four Gentlemen'.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗托物言志，用“咬定”“立根”等拟人词写竹石的顽强，“千磨万击”夸张历炼之烈，两联对偶工整，借竹喻人，表现坚毅不屈的品格。
rhetoric.en: Personifying the bamboo with words like 'bite fast,' and exaggerating its trials with a thousand grindings, ten thousand blows, all in neat parallel couplets, the poem praises through the plant a person's unyielding strength of character.

sandhi.zh: "咬"是上声，在非上声"定"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǎo。
sandhi.en: 咬 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 定; the written pinyin stays yǎo.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"放"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 放 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "尔"是上声，在非上声"东"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：ěr。
sandhi.en: 尔 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 东; the written pinyin stays ěr.

sandhi.zh: "北"是上声，在非上声"风"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：běi。
sandhi.en: 北 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 风; the written pinyin stays běi.

lines.pinyin: yì qiū tōng guó zhī shàn yì zhě yě
lines.zh: 弈秋，是全国最擅长下棋的人。
lines.en: Yi Qiu was the best chess player in the whole country.

lines.pinyin: shǐ yì qiū huì èr rén yì
lines.zh: 让弈秋教两个人下棋，
lines.en: Suppose Yi Qiu were made to teach two people chess:

lines.text: 其一人专心致志，惟弈秋之为听；
lines.pinyin: qí yī rén zhuān xīn zhì zhì wéi yì qiū zhī wéi tīng
lines.zh: 其中一个人专心致志，只听弈秋的教导；
lines.en: one of them concentrates completely and listens only to Yi Qiu;

lines.text: 一人虽听之，一心以为有鸿鹄将至，思援弓缴而射之。
lines.pinyin: yī rén suī tīng zhī yī xīn yǐ wéi yǒu hóng hú jiāng zhì sī yuán gōng zhuó ér shè zhī
lines.zh: 另一个人虽然也在听，却一心以为有天鹅将要飞来，想着拉弓搭箭去射它。
lines.en: the other, though listening, keeps thinking a swan is about to come, and plans to draw his bow and shoot it down.

lines.pinyin: suī yǔ zhī jù xué fú ruò zhī yǐ
lines.zh: 虽然和前一个人一起学习，棋艺却比不上他了。
lines.en: Though he studies alongside the first, he is not his equal.

lines.pinyin: wéi shì qí zhì fú ruò yú
lines.zh: 能说是因为他的智力不如前一个人吗？
lines.en: Is this because his intelligence is inferior?

lines.pinyin: yuē fēi rán yě
lines.zh: 回答说：不是这样的。
lines.en: The answer is: no, it is not.

chars.zh: 的；又作代词“它/他”，或宾语前置标志。
“之为听”中助词，宾语前置标志（多音字：wèi 指因为、替）。
将要（多音字：jiàng 指将领）。
系在箭上的生丝绳，此处指带绳的箭（此处读 zhuó；多音字：jiǎo 指缴纳）。
和、跟；句末“弗若与”中读 yú，同“欤”，表疑问。
句末语气助词，相当于“了”。

background.zh: 选自《孟子·告子上》，是孟子用来说理的一则寓言式短文。
background.en: From the 'Gaozi I' chapter of the Mencius, this short parable is used to make a point about learning.

culture.zh: 弈秋是先秦著名棋手，“弈”指围棋，是中国古代重要的智力游戏。
culture.en: Yi Qiu was a famed pre-Qin chess master; 'yi' refers to weiqi (Go), an important ancient intellectual game.

rhetoric.zh: 文章用两人学棋作对比，结尾以反问点明：学习的差异不在智力，而在是否专心。
rhetoric.en: Through a contrast between two learners and a closing rhetorical question, it shows that the difference lies not in talent but in concentration.

sandhi.zh: "者"在上声"也"前变读阳平（第二声）：zhě→zhé。
sandhi.en: 者 comes before the third-tone 也, so it is read in second tone: zhě → zhé.

sandhi.zh: "使"是上声，在非上声"弈"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shǐ。
sandhi.en: 使 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 弈; the written pinyin stays shǐ.

sandhi.where: 其一人专心致志，惟弈秋之为听；
sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"人"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 人 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.where: 一人虽听之，一心以为有鸿鹄将至，思援弓缴而射之。
sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"人"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 人 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.where: 一人虽听之，一心以为有鸿鹄将至，思援弓缴而射之。
sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"心"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 心 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.where: 一人虽听之，一心以为有鸿鹄将至，思援弓缴而射之。
sandhi.zh: "以"是上声，在非上声"为"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǐ。
sandhi.en: 以 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 为; the written pinyin stays yǐ.

sandhi.where: 一人虽听之，一心以为有鸿鹄将至，思援弓缴而射之。
sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"鸿"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鸿; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "与"是上声，在非上声"之"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 与 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 之; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

lines.text: 孔子东游，见两小儿辩斗，
lines.pinyin: kǒng zǐ dōng yóu jiàn liǎng xiǎo ér biàn dòu
lines.zh: 孔子到东方游历，看见两个小孩在争辩，
lines.en: Confucius, travelling east, saw two children arguing,

lines.pinyin: wèn qí gù
lines.zh: 便问他们争辩的原因。
lines.en: and asked them the reason.

lines.text: 一儿曰：“我以日始出时去人近，而日中时远也。”
lines.pinyin: yī ér yuē wǒ yǐ rì shǐ chū shí qù rén jìn ér rì zhōng shí yuǎn yě
lines.zh: 一个小孩说：“我认为太阳刚出来时离人近，而正午时离人远。”
lines.en: One child said: 'I think the sun is near at sunrise and far at noon.'

lines.text: 一儿以日初出远，而日中时近。
lines.pinyin: yī ér yǐ rì chū chū yuǎn ér rì zhōng shí jìn
lines.zh: 另一个小孩认为太阳刚出来时离人远，而正午时离人近。
lines.en: The other thought the sun was far at sunrise and near at noon.

lines.text: 一儿曰：“日初出大如车盖，及日中则如盘盂，此不为远者小而近者大乎？”
lines.pinyin: yī ér yuē rì chū chū dà rú chē gài jí rì zhōng zé rú pán yú cǐ bù wéi yuǎn zhě xiǎo ér jìn zhě dà hū
lines.zh: 一个小孩说：“太阳刚出来时大得像车盖，到了正午却像盘子，这不正是远的小、近的大吗？”
lines.en: One child said: 'At sunrise the sun is big as a carriage canopy, but at noon it is like a plate or bowl; isn't this because what is far looks small and what is near looks big?'

lines.text: 一儿曰：“日初出沧沧凉凉，及其日中如探汤，此不为近者热而远者凉乎？”
lines.pinyin: yī ér yuē rì chū chū cāng cāng liáng liáng jí qí rì zhōng rú tàn tāng cǐ bù wéi jìn zhě rè ér yuǎn zhě liáng hū
lines.zh: 另一个小孩说：“太阳刚出来时清清凉凉，到了正午却热得像把手伸进热水里，这不正是近的热、远的凉吗？”
lines.en: The other said: 'At sunrise it is cool and chilly, but at noon it feels like reaching into hot water; isn't this because what is near is hot and what is far is cool?'

lines.pinyin: kǒng zǐ bù néng jué yě
lines.zh: 孔子也不能判断谁对谁错。
lines.en: Confucius could not decide who was right.

lines.text: 两小儿笑曰：“孰为汝多知乎？”
lines.pinyin: liǎng xiǎo ér xiào yuē shú wèi rǔ duō zhì hū
lines.zh: 两个小孩笑着说：“谁说你知识渊博呢？”
lines.en: The two children laughed and said: 'Who says you are so learned?'

chars.zh: 对人的尊称，孔子即孔先生。
看见（多音字：xiàn 同“现”，显现）。
辩斗，争论（多音字：dǒu 指斗笠、量器）。
日中即正午（多音字：zhòng 指击中）。
车，车盖即车上的篷盖（多音字：jū 指象棋的车）。
盘子，盘盂即盘碗类器皿。
盛液体的圆口器皿，盘盂泛指盘碗。
是；句末“孰为汝多知”中读 wèi，同“谓”，说（多音字）。
句末语气助词，表反问，相当于“吗”。
沧沧凉凉，形容清凉寒冷。
凉、清凉（多音字：liàng 指晾凉）。
此处通“智”，智慧、见识（多音字：zhī 指知道）。

background.zh: 选自《列子·汤问》，是一则寓言故事，借两小儿辩日说明道理。
background.en: From the 'Tang Wen' chapter of the Liezi, this fable uses two children debating the sun to make a point.

culture.zh: 故事反映古人对自然现象的探究精神，连博学的孔子也坦言“不能决”。
culture.en: It reflects the ancients' spirit of inquiry into nature; even the learned Confucius honestly admits he cannot decide.

rhetoric.zh: 两小儿各以“大如车盖”“如盘盂”“如探汤”等比喻申说己见，句式对仗工整；全文用对比和反问，说明知识无穷、学无止境，也赞扬实事求是的态度。
rhetoric.en: The two children each argue their case with similes—big as a carriage canopy, like a plate, like reaching into hot water—in matching parallel phrasing; through contrast and rhetorical questions throughout, the piece shows that knowledge is boundless and praises honesty about the limits of what one knows.

lines.pinyin: zhǔ dòu rán dòu qí,
lines.zh: 煮着豆子，燃烧着豆秸，
lines.en: Beans are boiled while their stalks are burned as fuel,

lines.pinyin: dòu zài fǔ zhōng qì.
lines.zh: 豆子在锅里哭泣。
lines.en: and the beans weep within the pot.

lines.pinyin: běn shì tóng gēn shēng,
lines.zh: 豆子和豆秸本来是从同一条根上生长出来的，
lines.en: We grew from one and the same root,

lines.pinyin: xiāng jiān hé tài jí
lines.zh: 又何必这样急迫地相互煎熬呢？
lines.en: why torment each other so fiercely?

chars.zh: 豆秸，豆茎晒干后的柴草。
里面（多音字：zhòng 指击中）。
互相（多音字：xiàng 指相貌）。
煎熬，此指用火烹煮、逼迫。

background.zh: 相传魏文帝曹丕忌惮弟弟曹植的才学，命他在七步之内成诗，否则问罪；曹植应声成此诗，以萁豆相煎喻兄弟相逼，曹丕闻之愀然动容。
background.en: Legend holds that Emperor Cao Pi, wary of his brother Cao Zhi's talent, ordered him to compose a poem within seven steps or face punishment; Cao Zhi produced this poem on the spot, likening the stalks scorching the beans to a brother's cruelty, and Cao Pi was said to be moved to shame on hearing it.

culture.zh: 此诗以豆与萁本为同根，却相煎相残，比喻同胞兄弟骨肉相逼，“本是同根生，相煎何太急”已成为劝诫骨肉相残的千古名句。
culture.en: The poem likens the bean and its stalk—born of the same root, yet scorching one another—to brothers turning on their own flesh and blood; 'born of the same root, why torment each other so' has become an enduring rebuke of kin who turn against kin.

rhetoric.zh: 借豆萁相煎设喻，“泣”字拟人，赋豆以哀情；末句以反问收束，“相煎”语意双关，既写豆萁，又暗指兄弟，含蓄悲愤。
rhetoric.en: The scorching of bean by stalk becomes an extended metaphor; weep personifies the bean with sorrow; the closing rhetorical question turns on the double meaning of 'scorching each other'—naming the beans while pointing at brothers—restrained yet full of grief.

sandhi.en: 煮 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 豆; the written pinyin stays zhǔ.

poems.title: 春夜喜雨
poems.titleEn: Delighting in Rain on a Spring Night
poems.author: 杜甫

lines.pinyin: hǎo yǔ zhī shí jié
lines.zh: 好雨懂得适应季节的需要，
lines.en: A good rain knows just the season it should fall,

lines.pinyin: dāng chūn nǎi fā shēng
lines.zh: 正当春天来临的时候就悄悄降落。
lines.en: arriving right when spring begins.

lines.pinyin: suí fēng qián rù yè
lines.zh: 伴随着春风悄悄地在夜里降临，
lines.en: It steals in with the wind under cover of night,

lines.pinyin: rùn wù xì wú shēng
lines.zh: 细细地滋润万物，悄然无声。
lines.en: fine and silent, moistening all things.

lines.pinyin: yě jìng yún jù hēi
lines.zh: 田野间的小路上乌云一片漆黑，
lines.en: The country lanes are shrouded in dark clouds,

lines.pinyin: jiāng chuán huǒ dú míng
lines.zh: 只有江面上渔船的灯火独自明亮。
lines.en: and only a boat's lone lantern glows on the river.

lines.pinyin: xiǎo kàn hóng shī chù
lines.zh: 天亮时看那被雨水打湿的红花之处，
lines.en: At dawn, seeing the rain-soaked red blossoms,

lines.pinyin: huā zhòng jǐn guān chéng
lines.zh: 锦官城中处处都是沉甸甸带雨的鲜花。
lines.en: one finds Jinguan City's flowers heavy with rain throughout.

chars.zh: 知道、懂得，这里指雨仿佛懂得时节。
正当、正值；多音字，又读 dàng（当作）。
chars.en: just as; at the time of

chars.zh: 发生、降下；多音字，又读 fà（头发）。
沉重，这里指花沾雨后显得沉重；多音字，又读 chóng（重复）。

background.zh: 作于唐肃宗上元二年（761年）春，杜甫在成都草堂居住时所作，抒发对滋润万物的春雨的喜悦之情。
background.en: Written in the spring of 761, while Du Fu was living at his thatched cottage in Chengdu; it expresses his joy at a spring rain that nourishes everything.

culture.zh: “锦官城”是成都的别称，因当地织锦业发达、曾设官员管理而得名。
culture.en: 'Jinguan City' is an old name for Chengdu, so called because the city's fine brocade-weaving industry was once overseen by a government office.

rhetoric.zh: 首联“知”字将雨拟人化，赋予春雨体贴人意的情态；颔联“随风潜入夜，润物细无声”对偶精工，写雨悄然无声、滋润万物的姿态，历来被誉为咏雨的绝唱；颈联“野径云俱黑，江船火独明”以黑暗反衬孤灯之明；尾联“红湿处”以颜色借代花朵，并由眼前实景转为想象次日清晨雨后繁花满城的虚景，虚实相生。
rhetoric.en: The word zhi ('knows') in the opening couplet personifies the rain as considerate and aware; the second couplet—'it follows the wind, slipping quietly into the night, and moistens all things finely, without a sound'—is a masterfully wrought parallel couplet praised as the finest description of rain in Chinese poetry; the third couplet uses the surrounding darkness as a foil for the lone boat lantern's brightness; the closing couplet uses color ('the red, wet places') as metonymy for the blossoms themselves, shifting from the real nighttime scene to an imagined vision of the rain-soaked city abloom the next morning.

sandhi.en: 喜 comes before the third-tone 雨, so it is read in second tone: xǐ → xí.

lines.pinyin: jiāng shàng wǎng lái rén
lines.zh: 江岸上来来往往的人们，
lines.en: People coming and going along the riverbank,

lines.pinyin: dàn ài lú yú měi
lines.zh: 只喜爱鲈鱼的鲜美味道。
lines.en: care only for how delicious the perch tastes.

lines.pinyin: jūn kàn yī yè zhōu
lines.zh: 你看那像一片树叶般的小船，
lines.en: Look at that small boat, tiny as a single leaf,

lines.pinyin: chū mò fēng bō lǐ
lines.zh: 在风浪中忽隐忽现。
lines.en: rising and vanishing amid the wind and waves.

chars.zh: 上面，江上即江边、江面上。
数词一；一叶舟形容小船之小。
叶子；一叶舟比喻小船像一片树叶。
隐没、消失；多音字，又读 méi（没有）。

background.zh: 范仲淹任职地方时所作，借江上渔民出没风波、捕鱼艰险的情景，抒发对劳动者的同情与感慨。
background.en: Written while Fan Zhongyan served as a local official, the poem uses the sight of fishermen braving wind and waves to voice sympathy for laborers whose hardship is easily overlooked.

culture.zh: 范仲淹是北宋著名政治家、文学家，以《岳阳楼记》“先天下之忧而忧”的情怀著称，此诗同样体现了他关切民生的一贯态度。
culture.en: Fan Zhongyan was a renowned Northern Song statesman and writer, famous for the concern for the people voiced in his 'Yueyang Tower'; this poem reflects that same lifelong care for ordinary people's hardship.

rhetoric.zh: 以“一叶舟”比喻小船之渺小，江岸行人只爱鲈鱼美味，反衬渔民出没风波捕鱼的艰险，寄寓诗人的悲悯之情。
rhetoric.en: The boat is likened to 'a single leaf' to convey its smallness; the shore-dwellers who care only for the perch's taste serve as a foil for the fisherman's unseen danger, carrying the poet's compassion for the laborer's hardship.

sandhi.zh: "往"是上声，在非上声"来"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǎng。
sandhi.en: 往 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 来; the written pinyin stays wǎng.

sandhi.zh: "但"是去声，在去声"爱"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dàn。
sandhi.en: 但 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 爱; the written pinyin stays dàn.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"叶"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 叶 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

lines.pinyin: qīng qīng yuán zhōng kuí
lines.zh: 园中的葵菜青翠茂盛，
lines.en: The mallow in the garden grows lush and green,

lines.pinyin: zhāo lù dài rì xī
lines.zh: 清晨的露珠等待着被阳光晒干。
lines.en: morning dew upon it waits to be dried by the sun.

lines.pinyin: yáng chūn bù dé zé
lines.zh: 温暖的春天散布着恩泽，
lines.en: Radiant spring spreads its bounty over all,

lines.pinyin: wàn wù shēng guāng huī
lines.zh: 万物因此焕发出蓬勃的光彩。
lines.en: and all living things glow with vigor.

lines.pinyin: cháng kǒng qiū jié zhì
lines.zh: 常常担心秋天很快到来，
lines.en: Always fearing the autumn season's approach,

lines.pinyin: kūn huáng huā yè shuāi
lines.zh: 那时花叶会枯黄衰败。
lines.en: when leaf and blossom turn sallow and decay.

lines.pinyin: bǎi chuān dōng dào hǎi
lines.zh: 千万条河流向东流入大海，
lines.en: A hundred rivers flow eastward to the sea,

lines.pinyin: hé shí fù xī guī
lines.zh: 何时才能再向西流回呢？
lines.en: when will they ever turn back west again?

lines.pinyin: shào zhuàng bù nǔ lì
lines.zh: 年轻时不努力奋斗，
lines.en: If one does not strive in youth's strong years,

lines.pinyin: lǎo dà tú shāng bēi
lines.zh: 到了年老只能白白地悲伤了！
lines.en: in old age all that's left is empty grief!

chars.zh: 青翠、绿色，青青形容茂盛的样子。
早晨；多音字，又读 cháo（朝代）。
阳光；阳春指温暖的春天。
同“花”，花朵；多音字，又读 huá（华丽）。
年少、年轻；多音字，又读 shǎo（少量）。

background.zh: 选自《乐府诗集》，是汉代乐府诗中广为流传的劝勉之作，以园中葵菜的生长凋零、江河东流不返，比喻光阴易逝，劝人珍惜青春、及时努力。
background.en: Collected in the Yuefu Poems, this widely circulated Han-dynasty yuefu ballad uses the mallow's growth and decay and the rivers' irreversible flow to the sea as images for time's swift passing, urging the young to seize the day.

culture.zh: “少壮不努力，老大徒伤悲”是中国家喻户晓的劝学名句，常被用来勉励青少年珍惜光阴。
culture.en: 'If one does not strive in youth, old age brings only empty grief' is one of the most famous lines in Chinese literature urging the young to make the most of their time.

rhetoric.zh: “青青”叠词状葵菜之盛；以阳春万物之盛反衬秋节叶衰，写生命由盛转衰的必然；末以百川东流不返比喻光阴易逝，并以反问加强语气，引出劝勉之意。
rhetoric.en: The reduplicated qingqing paints the lush mallow; spring's abundance is set against autumn's decay to convey life's inevitable decline; the closing lines liken the rivers' irreversible eastward flow to time's swift passing, sharpened by a rhetorical question, leading into the poem's exhortation.

sandhi.zh: "待"是去声，在去声"日"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dài。
sandhi.en: 待 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 日; the written pinyin stays dài.

sandhi.en: 老 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 大; the written pinyin stays lǎo.

poems.title: 早春呈水部张十八员外
poems.titlePinyin: zǎo chūn chéng shuǐ bù zhāng shí bā yuán wài
poems.titleEn: Early Spring, Presented to Zhang Ji of the Water Bureau
poems.author: 韩愈

lines.pinyin: tiān jiē xiǎo yǔ rùn rú sū
lines.zh: 京城街道上的细雨，润泽得如同酥油一般，
lines.en: Fine rain on the capital's streets is smooth and soft as cream,

lines.pinyin: cǎo sè yáo kàn jìn què wú
lines.zh: 远看草色依稀可见，走近却又看不清楚了。
lines.en: the grass shows green from a distance, but fades from sight up close.

lines.pinyin: zuì shì yī nián chūn hǎo chù
lines.zh: 这正是一年之中春天最美好的时节，
lines.en: This is the very best moment of spring in the whole year,

lines.pinyin: jué shèng yān liǔ mǎn huáng dū
lines.zh: 远远胜过晚春柳絮如烟、飘满京城的景象。
lines.en: far lovelier than the hazy willow-down that later fills the whole city.

chars.zh: 酥油，一种乳制品，形容细腻润滑。
皇都，京城；多音字，又读 dōu（都是）。

background.zh: 韩愈写给友人水部员外郎张籍（排行十八）的诗，描写早春细雨中草色若隐若现的独特景致，因诗中“小雨”意象生动，后人也常以《初春小雨》为题传诵。
background.en: Written by Han Yu for his friend Zhang Ji (eighteenth among his cousins), a Water Bureau official, the poem captures the elusive green of early-spring grass glimpsed through fine rain; because of its vivid 'light rain' image, it is also often known and recited under the title 'Light Rain in Early Spring' (初春小雨).

culture.zh: 唐代官员常以排行称呼，如“张十八”即张籍在同族兄弟中排行第十八；此诗以早春胜过暮春的观点，体现诗人独特的审美眼光。
culture.en: Tang officials were often addressed by their birth order among cousins — 'Zhang the Eighteenth' refers to Zhang Ji; the poem's claim that early spring surpasses late spring reveals Han Yu's distinctive aesthetic taste.

rhetoric.zh: “润如酥”以酥油的细腻触感通感式比喻雨的润泽；“遥看近却无”白描早春草色若隐若现之态；末两句以晚春烟柳的绚烂反衬、并虚拟这一想象中的景象，衬托眼前早春之景的清新可贵。
rhetoric.en: 'Moist as cream' uses the tactile smoothness of cream in a synaesthetic simile for the rain's moistness; 'green from afar, faded up close' plainly depicts early spring grass's elusive color; the closing lines conjure the imagined splendor of late-spring willow-down as a foil, setting off the quiet freshness of the present early-spring scene.

sandhi.zh: "早"是上声，在非上声"春"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǎo。
sandhi.en: 早 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 春; the written pinyin stays zǎo.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"部"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 部; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "小"在上声"雨"前变读阳平（第二声）：xiǎo→xiáo。
sandhi.en: 小 comes before the third-tone 雨, so it is read in second tone: xiǎo → xiáo.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"润"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 润; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

sandhi.zh: "草"是上声，在非上声"色"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎo。
sandhi.en: 草 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 色; the written pinyin stays cǎo.

sandhi.zh: "近"是去声，在去声"却"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jìn。
sandhi.en: 近 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 却; the written pinyin stays jìn.

sandhi.zh: "最"是去声，在去声"是"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：zuì。
sandhi.en: 最 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 是; the written pinyin stays zuì.

sandhi.zh: "一"在阴平/阳平/上声"年"前变读去声（第四声）：yī→yì。
sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 年 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.

sandhi.zh: "好"是上声，在非上声"处"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：hǎo。
sandhi.en: 好 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 处; the written pinyin stays hǎo.

sandhi.zh: "柳"在上声"满"前变读阳平（第二声）：liǔ→liú。
sandhi.en: 柳 comes before the third-tone 满, so it is read in second tone: liǔ → liú.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"皇"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 皇; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

lines.pinyin: yīng lián jī chǐ yìn cāng tái
lines.zh: 大概是园主怜惜青苔，怕木底鞋踩出印痕，
lines.en: Perhaps the garden's owner spares the moss from clog-prints,

lines.pinyin: xiǎo kòu chái fēi jiǔ bù kāi
lines.zh: 我轻轻敲打柴门，很久也没有人来开门。
lines.en: so I knock softly at the wicker gate — long it stays closed.

lines.pinyin: chūn sè mǎn yuán guān bù zhù
lines.zh: 满园的春色是关不住的，
lines.en: Spring's beauty fills the garden — it cannot be shut in,

lines.pinyin: yī zhī hóng xìng chū qiáng lái
lines.zh: 一枝红色的杏花探出墙头来。
lines.en: for one branch of red apricot blossom leans out over the wall.

chars.zh: 应该、大概；多音字，又读 yìng（回应）。
屐齿，木底鞋底的齿状突起。
苍老、青绿色；苍苔即青苔。
柴门，用树枝编成的简陋门；柴扉即柴门。
景色；春色即春天的景色。
停住、关住；这里表示“关得住”。

background.zh: 诗人春日游园，因主人不在或不愿开门而未能入内，却从墙外望见一枝红杏探出墙头，由此领悟满园春色是关不住的。
background.en: On a spring outing, the poet finds the garden's gate shut — perhaps the owner is out or unwilling to open it — yet spots a branch of red apricot blossom leaning out over the wall, realizing that spring's abundance cannot be contained.

culture.zh: “春色满园关不住，一枝红杏出墙来”是描写春意蓬勃、生机不可阻挡的千古名句，也常被引申比喻新生事物无法被压制。
culture.en: 'Spring fills the garden and cannot be shut in, one branch of red apricot leans out over the wall' is a timeless line celebrating spring's unstoppable vitality, often extended as a metaphor for anything new and vigorous that cannot be suppressed.

rhetoric.zh: 先写敲门久不开的扫兴，反衬后文意外发现红杏出墙的惊喜；末两句将春色、红杏拟人化，写生机不可阻挡、探头出墙的情态。
rhetoric.en: The initial disappointment of a long-unanswered knock serves as a foil for the surprise delight that follows; the closing lines personify spring's color and the apricot branch, depicting an unstoppable vitality that pokes its head out over the wall.

sandhi.zh: "齿"是上声，在非上声"印"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：chǐ。
sandhi.en: 齿 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 印; the written pinyin stays chǐ.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"园"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。

sandhi.en: 一 before the (1st/2nd/3rd-tone) 枝 changes to fourth tone: yī → yì.
